characters.name: Lyra Moonshard
characters.description: A quiet illusionist known for infiltrating royal vaults using moonlight-based glamour magic. Lyra prefers stealth and rarely harms anyone, leaving only faint silver motes behind after a heist.

caseFiles.title: Moonlit Vault Breach
caseFiles.stolenObjects: A small, silver-inlaid prism mounted within a decorative housing. Previously classified as a ceremonial charm with no value, no threat designation, and no recorded strategic value.
caseFiles.incidentSummary: A highly controlled infiltration of Silver Crest Royal Bank resulted in the extraction of a seemingly low-value ceremonial prism. No alarms were triggered, and guards reported only brief disorientation. The suspect ignored high-value assets, reinforcing a pattern of targeting obscure arcane objects.
evidence: Lunar residue found on the scene
Low frequency Arcane signature
No biological or material traces recovered
investigatorNotes: Target selection inconsistent with known theft patterns
High value assets ignored
Suspect displayed a strong aversion to collateral damage

caseFiles.title: Phantom Treasury Incident
caseFiles.stolenObjects: A crystalline ledger prism used historically for ceremonial accounting rituals.
caseFiles.incidentSummary: An undetected breach of the Halcyon Treasury Annex led to the disappearance of a crystalline ledger artifact. No witnesses or forced entry were recorded. System irregularities suggest the use of illusion-based interference during the extraction.
evidence: Residual arcane signature consistent with refractive illusion magic
Temporary data desynchronization across multiple storage systems
Silver particulate traces detected near archival vault (dissipated within minutes)
investigatorNotes: Target selection mirrors Case XM-301
Subject demonstrates continued disinterest in monetary assets
Removed object emits low-level resonance under arcane scanning

caseFiles.title: Silver Market Disappearance
caseFiles.stolenObjects: An ornamental pendulum device sold as a novelty timepiece.
caseFiles.incidentSummary: In a crowded public setting, the suspect removed a pendulum device without detection. Witnesses reported brief visual distortion and environmental anomalies. The operation demonstrates increased confidence and precision in high-traffic environments.
evidence: Concentrated lunar-aligned residue at point of disappearance
Minor temporal distortion recorded on nearby enchanted clocks
No physical traces recovered
investigatorNotes: Subject capable of operating in high-density civilian environments undetected
Increasing precision suggests familiarity with artifact identification
Item classification updated: Arcane Object â€” Pending Analysis

caseFiles.title: Lunaris Jewel Heist
caseFiles.stolenObjects: A fractured gemstone fragment embedded within a ceremonial crown.
caseFiles.incidentSummary: A ceremonial gemstone fragment was extracted during a high-security exhibition. Unlike prior incidents, evidence suggests interference from a secondary unknown source, resulting in irregular movement patterns and elevated arcane activity.
evidence: Strongest arcane resonance recorded to date
Residual signature shows interference pattern (non-Lyra origin)
Trace thermal distortion inconsistent with illusion magic
investigatorNotes: First confirmed indication of external interference during operation
Subject deviated from optimal extraction route
Movement patterns suggest urgency rather than precision

characters.name: Kael Nightshade
characters.description: An elusive information broker who trades secrets for influence. Kael has a network spanning both the criminal underworld and high society, often manipulating events behind the scenes. Known for staying in the shadows, he rarely acts directly but his information has led to multiple high-profile heists and sabotage incidents.

caseFiles.title: Halcyon Vault Compromise
caseFiles.stolenObjects: Encrypted access keys for multiple high-security vaults
caseFiles.incidentSummary: A coordinated breach targeting encrypted vault access keys was executed through digital infiltration rather than physical entry. Evidence suggests Kael acted as an orchestrator, enabling external actors to benefit from the compromised systems.
evidence: Digital traces of unauthorized network access
Encrypted logs hint at third-party coordination
Unidentified fingerprint residue
investigatorNotes: Suspect acts as coordinator, not executor
Targets valuable digital assets
Likely involved with other high-profile criminals

caseFiles.title: Seraphine's Diversion Coordination
caseFiles.stolenObjects: None directly, suspected role in facilitating heist
caseFiles.incidentSummary: Suspicious financial activity and intercepted communications indicate Kael facilitated a large-scale diversion within the market district. No direct theft occurred, but the disruption aligns with other coordinated criminal operations.
evidence: Intercepted communications with Seraphine
Pattern of previous market disturbances
Suspicious financial transactions pre-incident
investigatorNotes: Provides intelligence and strategic coordination
Avoids direct confrontation
Evidence links him to multiple other heists indirectly

caseFiles.title: Lyra Network Interception
caseFiles.stolenObjects: Intel on security schedules and guard rotations
caseFiles.incidentSummary: Confidential security data was extracted remotely just prior to a known Lyra Moonshard heist. Timing strongly suggests Kael supplied critical intelligence, reinforcing his role as a behind-the-scenes enabler.
evidence: Accessed confidential reports remotely
No physical traces on site
Coordination timing aligns with Lyraâ€™s heist
investigatorNotes: Likely supplied Lyra with target intelligence
Operates with minimal direct exposure
Strong network of informants evident

characters.name: Selene Darkveil
characters.description: A cunning rogue who uses sound and shadow manipulation to carry out high-profile thefts and distractions. Selene has a personal vendetta against Kael Nightshade and often crosses paths with Lyra Moonshard, either as a competitor or temporary ally. Known for leaving haunting melodies at the scene of her crimes, earning her the moniker 'Midnight Siren.'

caseFiles.title: Ashen Gala Heist
caseFiles.stolenObjects: A collection of ceremonial musical instruments
caseFiles.incidentSummary: During a high-profile gala, multiple ceremonial instruments were stolen amid widespread sensory disruption. Witnesses reported haunting audio distortions, consistent with Selene’s signature use of sound-based manipulation.
evidence: Residual sonic anomalies detected
Security footage shows shadowy figure slipping between guests
No physical entry point forced
investigatorNotes: Targeted high-value ceremonial instruments
Operates with precise timing
Evidence indicates she may be aware of Kaelâ€™s intel operations

caseFiles.title: Lunaris Night Market Interference
caseFiles.witnesses: Market vendors reported strange sounds and flickering shadows
caseFiles.stolenObjects: Several rare gemstones
caseFiles.incidentSummary: A coordinated disturbance involving sonic anomalies and visual confusion allowed for the theft of rare gemstones. Evidence suggests possible overlap with Lyra Moonshard’s activity, though intent remains unclear.
evidence: Sonic disruptions caused temporary panic
Trace residues of phosphorescent dust
Patterns suggest diversion coordinated with another actor (Lyra)
investigatorNotes: Operates independently, but links to Lyraâ€™s heists are suspected
Expert in psychological and sensory manipulation
Avoids leaving traditional forensic evidence

caseFiles.title: Kael Intelligence Breach
caseFiles.stolenObjects: Confidential heist schedules
caseFiles.incidentSummary: Sensitive heist data was extracted from secured systems, likely targeting Kael Nightshade’s network. The breach indicates a strategic effort to intercept or undermine his operations rather than conduct a standard theft.
evidence: Compromised communication channels
Evidence of coordination with Lyra
Encrypted messages traced back to Seleneâ€™s network
investigatorNotes: Likely working to intercept Kaelâ€™s intel
Operates with extreme stealth and precision
Ties to previous heists indicate long-term planning

characters.name: Seraphine Emberveil
characters.description: A charismatic fire mage who commands underground smuggling rings. Her temper is as infamous as her magic, and entire warehouses have been reduced to ash when negotiations failed.

caseFiles.title: Dockside Cinder Event
caseFiles.stolenObjects: A reinforced cargo container registered under private contract.
caseFiles.incidentSummary: A controlled fire engulfed sections of the Virex docks, masking the extraction of a secured cargo container. Despite extensive damage, the burn pattern suggests deliberate containment and precision.
evidence: Residual flame patterns forming controlled burn boundaries
Extreme heat concentration beyond natural thresholds
No ignition source identified
investigatorNotes: Fire spread avoided high-value shipments
Highly controlled destructive output

caseFiles.title: Ashen Archive Breach
caseFiles.stolenObjects: A sealed archival relic of unknown purpose.
caseFiles.incidentSummary: An archival facility was infiltrated and partially burned to access a sealed relic. Fire appears to have been used tactically rather than destructively, indicating intentional targeting.
evidence: Localized burn radius with precise boundary control
Arcane residue consistent with flame manipulation
Suppression system interference
investigatorNotes: Selective targeting behavior
Deviation from typical arson patterns

caseFiles.title: Emberglass Cathedral Incident
caseFiles.stolenObjects: A fractured mirror shard embedded within altar structure.
caseFiles.incidentSummary: A relic embedded within a cathedral structure was removed following a localized thermal anomaly. Evidence suggests interference from an external source, complicating attribution.
evidence: Thermal inversion prior to ignition
Arcane interference patterns
Residual energy inconsistent with known profile
investigatorNotes: Fire used as secondary mechanism
Possible external interference

caseFiles.title: Lunaris Counterstrike Event
caseFiles.stolenObjects: None confirmed
caseFiles.incidentSummary: An attempted operation at the exhibition hall was disrupted by overlapping arcane signatures. The event marks a confirmed interaction between Seraphine and Lyra, resulting in incomplete execution.
evidence: Dual-signature interference (thermal + refractive)
Incomplete combustion pattern
Spatial distortion overlap
investigatorNotes: First confirmed interaction with Lyra Moonshard
Interrupted spellwork detected

characters.name: Orion Vale
characters.description: A methodical data thief specializing in the extraction and alteration of historical and arcane records. Orion targets archives, repositories, and institutions of knowledge, often leaving no indication that data has been removed—only subtle inconsistencies in recorded history. Investigators suspect his activities may be altering timelines or concealing larger coordinated operations.

caseFiles.title: Halcyon Archive Discrepancy
caseFiles.stolenObjects: Unknown — multiple archival records show conflicting revisions.
caseFiles.incidentSummary: Multiple archival records were altered without evidence of physical intrusion. The incident suggests deliberate manipulation of historical data rather than theft, with long-term implications for record integrity.
evidence: Timestamp inconsistencies across archival entries
Partial digital overwrite signatures
No signs of forced access
investigatorNotes: Records appear altered rather than removed
Potential collaboration with external intelligence broker
Pattern suggests deliberate historical obfuscation

caseFiles.title: Chronicle Vault Breach
caseFiles.stolenObjects: Encrypted timeline registry fragments
caseFiles.incidentSummary: Encrypted timeline fragments were extracted from a secure records vault. Data fragmentation and routing patterns indicate coordination with external intelligence networks.
evidence: Fragmented data trails leading to multiple endpoints
Encryption layers consistent with Kael Nightshade’s network
Minor temporal desynchronization detected in system logs
investigatorNotes: Strong correlation with known Shadow Broker infrastructure
Subject likely prioritizes information over physical assets
Potential link to broader coordinated data theft operations

caseFiles.title: Silent Ledger Incident
caseFiles.stolenObjects: Financial records tied to black-market transactions
caseFiles.incidentSummary: Financial records tied to illicit operations were selectively erased. A witness reported memory inconsistencies, suggesting cognitive interference may be part of the subject’s methodology.
evidence: Localized memory disruption in witness
Selective deletion of transaction logs
Residual arcane interference in storage systems
investigatorNotes: Subject may possess cognitive interference capabilities
Data removal appears highly selective
Possible attempt to erase traces of other operatives

characters.name: Cassian Rhodes
characters.description: An elusive operative linked to multiple high-risk infiltration events across restricted facilities. Cassian demonstrates advanced tactical awareness and consistently avoids escalation, often leaving operations incomplete or disrupted rather than fully executed. His presence is frequently associated with compromised criminal activity rather than successful theft.

caseFiles.title: Virex Dock Interception
caseFiles.stolenObjects: None
caseFiles.incidentSummary: The subject infiltrated an active smuggling site but did not remove any assets. Evidence suggests intentional disruption of another operative’s activity rather than participation in the crime.
evidence: Security systems temporarily disabled without damage
Multiple contraband shipments left untouched
Unidentified figure observed leaving prior to incident escalation
investigatorNotes: Subject present but did not engage in theft
Timeline overlaps with Seraphine Emberveil activity
Possible interference with ongoing criminal operation

caseFiles.title: Halcyon Vault Disruption
caseFiles.stolenObjects: None
caseFiles.incidentSummary: A vault breach was initiated but not completed. Security systems were reset, preventing a larger compromise. The subject’s actions appear to have mitigated damage rather than caused it.
evidence: Vault access triggered but no assets removed
Security protocols reset remotely
Trace signature inconsistent with known offenders
investigatorNotes: Incident prevented a larger breach event
Potential overlap with Kael Nightshade network activity
Subject actions reduced overall damage

caseFiles.title: Lunaris Signal Interference
caseFiles.stolenObjects: None
caseFiles.incidentSummary: Communication systems were disabled during a separate heist, allowing unknown parties to escape. The subject is believed to have facilitated the extraction without directly engaging.
evidence: Communication disruption across all security channels
Arcane interference masking multiple presences
Exit vectors cleared prior to response arrival
investigatorNotes: Activity coincides with Lyra Moonshard’s extraction
Subject likely enabled escape conditions
Behavior suggests controlled intervention rather than participation

characters.name: Darius Vale
characters.description: A former enforcer turned rogue asset, Darius Vale is known for his ability to breach and dismantle fortified locations with methodical precision. Unlike other offenders, Vale exhibits disciplined, almost military execution patterns. He is currently held in a high-security containment facility following a coordinated capture operation, though concerns remain regarding his external connections and potential contingency planning.

caseFiles.title: Blackgate Containment Breach
caseFiles.stolenObjects: None
caseFiles.incidentSummary: The subject successfully breached a high-security facility using controlled force. Despite structural damage, the operation avoided unnecessary casualties, demonstrating disciplined execution.
evidence: Reinforced barriers dismantled using non-explosive force
Security routes predicted and countered in advance
Minimal collateral damage despite structural compromise
investigatorNotes: Highly trained in tactical movement and suppression
Demonstrates knowledge of institutional layouts
Behavior suggests prior exposure to similar facilities

caseFiles.title: Iron Corridor Incident
caseFiles.stolenObjects: Confidential transport schedules
caseFiles.incidentSummary: Confidential transport data was extracted from a restricted transit sector. The breach exploited system vulnerabilities without triggering alarms, indicating advanced planning.
evidence: Access points opened without triggering alarms
Surveillance blind spots exploited with precision
Exit executed prior to automated lockdown
investigatorNotes: Objective-focused operation with no unnecessary movement
Subject avoided confrontation unless required
Patterns align with structured operational training

caseFiles.title: Vale Apprehension Operation
caseFiles.stolenObjects: N/A
caseFiles.incidentSummary: A coordinated tactical operation resulted in the subject’s capture. Resistance was minimal, and behavior during apprehension suggests possible strategic compliance.
evidence: Subject subdued following coordinated containment maneuver
Resistance measured and controlled
No attempt made to flee once perimeter was secured
investigatorNotes: Capture executed with minimal force escalation
Subject displayed awareness of tactical positioning
Unclear whether surrender was strategic or situational

characters.name: Marcellus Faye
characters.description: A master forger and manipulator of arcane contracts, Marcellus traffics in legal loopholes, forged documents, and falsified magical signatures. Operating in the shadows of both criminal and bureaucratic systems, he can turn official records into weapons or shields, often rewriting the rules to protect allies or sabotage enemies. While he rarely engages in direct theft or combat, his interventions have altered the outcomes of multiple high-profile operations.

caseFiles.title: Halcyon Registry Fabrication
caseFiles.witnesses: Registry clerks reported unusual document signatures
caseFiles.stolenObjects: N/A — key official records altered
caseFiles.incidentSummary: Official records were altered to benefit unknown parties without any physical theft. The operation relied on forged arcane signatures, effectively rewriting institutional data.
evidence: Arcane signature inconsistent with original documentation
Trace glyph residues on parchment
Unauthorized magical authentication recorded
investigatorNotes: Records tampered with to favor unknown operatives
Operation executed without physical theft
Highly targeted alteration suggests prior knowledge of registry protocols

caseFiles.title: Elaris Guild Charter Compromise
caseFiles.stolenObjects: Altered charter documents and magical seals
caseFiles.incidentSummary: Multiple guild documents and seals were falsified, potentially shifting organizational authority. Subtle distortions indicate manipulation at both legal and arcane levels.
evidence: Forgery of multiple guild seals
Subtle temporal distortions on charters
No forced entry detected
investigatorNotes: Subject likely aiming to manipulate guild authority
Possible indirect collaboration with Orion Vale and Kael Nightshade
Demonstrates knowledge of both arcane law and bureaucratic loopholes
